200.q: I am the king of the jungle and live in prides.
I am the largest land animal on Earth.
I have black and white stripes and live in Africa.
I am the tallest animal on Earth.
I am the largest mammal in the ocean.
I have a long trunk and large ears, and I live in Asia.
I jump using powerful hind legs and carry my young in a pouch.
I have a black-and-white face and eat bamboo in China.
I am the fastest land animal.
I am a large flightless bird from Africa, the heaviest of all birds.
I am known for changing colors and having a long tongue.
I live in the Arctic and have white fur.
I am known for hopping and saying 'ribbit'.
I am a slow-moving reptile in trees in Asia, often green.
I am known as 'man's best friend.'
I purr and chase mice.
I bray and am similar to a horse but smaller.
I am pink and love mud baths on a farm.
I lay eggs and cluck on a farm.
I am the fastest swimmer in the ocean.
I am a marine mammal known for clapping flippers and balancing balls.
I have a hard shell and walk slowly on land.
I am tiny, fly, and produce honey.
I am a large bird of prey, the national symbol of the United States.
I am a black-and-white aquatic mammal nicknamed the 'killer whale.'
I am a small mammal who carries my young on my back, common in Australia.
I am known for my long ears and love carrots.
I howl at the moon and live in packs.
I am a waterfowl known for my 'quack' sound.
I produce milk on farms and go 'moo.'
I am a woolly farm animal and often counted to fall asleep.
I am a nocturnal bird famous for saying 'hoo.'
I am a graceful white waterbird symbolizing love.
I am a flightless bird that lives on icy continents.

400.q: I am the largest member of the cat family.
I am a great ape from the rainforests of Borneo and Sumatra.
I am the largest reptile alive, found in saltwater.
I am a large flightless bird from Australia, second tallest after the ostrich.
I am a North American mammal known for building dams and lodges.
I am a primate famous for being humans' closest relative.
I am a marsupial from Australia who eats only eucalyptus.
I am the only mammal that can truly fly.
I am a marine mammal known for echolocation and intelligence, often gray.
I am a large bear native to North America with a hump on my back.
I am a small fox famous for my huge ears, living in the Sahara.
I am a flightless bird from New Zealand and the national symbol there.
I am the heaviest snake in the world, found in South America.
I am a hoofed African mammal with two horns, the second largest land mammal.
I am a large ape from central Africa, larger than a chimpanzee.
I am known for my striking pink color from eating shrimp.
I am a marine reptile found in tropical seas with a hard shell.
I am a marine mammal with two long tusks living in Arctic waters.
I am the second-largest cat in the Americas after the jaguar.
I am a horned African antelope famous for huge spiral horns.
I am a small striped scavenger that 'laughs.'
I am known for diving deep and squirting ink.
I am a large bird of prey often called the 'king of the sky.'
I am a slow-moving mammal that lives upside down in trees.
I am the world's largest fish.
I am a venomous snake with a hood, famous in India.
I am a small Australian dog-like predator, famous for my bite force.
I am an African big cat known for hunting in coalitions of brothers.
I am a tropical bird known for vivid plumage and mimicking speech.
I am a giant lizard from Indonesia, the largest living lizard.
I scuttle sideways on beaches and pinch with my claws.
I am a tiny ocean creature with a curled upright body.
I am a clawed ocean crustacean often steamed red.

600.q: I am the only egg-laying mammal with a duck-like bill.
I am a small Australian marsupial often called the 'happiest animal.'
I am the largest rodent in the world.
I am an Andean camelid prized for my soft wool.
I am a flightless bird native to Antarctica, the largest penguin species.
I am a deep-sea cephalopod with the largest eyes of any known animal.
I am a large flightless bird from South America, similar to an ostrich.
I am an arboreal marsupial of Australia known for gliding between trees.
I am a hoofed mammal of the Arctic with broad antlers, where both sexes grow them.
I am the world's largest amphibian, found in China.
I am a small carnivore from Madagascar, the island's largest predator.
I am the only venomous lizard species native to the United States.
I am a small primate from Madagascar with a long striped tail.
I am a tiny crustacean famous for my pink color and tasty meat.
I am a marine mammal often called the 'sea cow.'
I am a small spiny mammal of Europe and Africa that curls into a ball.
I am a large freshwater fish nicknamed for my paddle-like snout.
I am an arctic cetacean famous for the long single tusk of the male.
I am a large dog-like canine native to the Ethiopian highlands.
I am a small African mammal famous for standing upright on guard.
I am a large ape from Sumatra, critically endangered.
I am a deep-sea fish known for my bioluminescent lure.
I am a large flightless bird from Australia covered in shaggy feathers.
I am a small antelope known as the smallest in the world, found in Africa.
I am a striped wild horse-like equid of Central Asia.
I am a fish that can survive on land for short periods using my pectoral fins.
I am the largest crab in the world by leg span, found in Japan.
I am a small carnivorous mammal of South America with a banded tail and snout.
I am a wild ox-like mammal of Southeast Asia and the world's largest bovine.
I am a small Antarctic crustacean that forms the basis of the food chain.
I am a scaly anteater, the most trafficked mammal in the world.
I am a striped African relative of the giraffe with zebra-like legs.
I am a pig-like mammal of Central America with a flexible snout.
